display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Poppins bold - competent but generic.

body.purpose: Paragraph text. Inter - web default, doesn't differentiate.

shadows.name: base
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow. Soft and safe.

shadows.name: section-lift
shadows.purpose: Feature cards with blue tint. Nice detail but overused.

shadows.name: hero-emphasis
shadows.purpose: Large images, dramatic depth. Getting heavy.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Recommended for future: exponential ease-out for natural motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Navy blue primary action button. Generic corporate style.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #003566; color: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 15px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #004578; box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: CTA Button (Yellow)
components.description: High-contrast yellow accent button. Visually jarring.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: #ffd60a; color: #003566; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #ffed4e; transform: scale(1.05); }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Standard rounded card with shadow. Used everywhere - no distinction.
components.html:
24/7 Convenience

Round-the-clock access to snacks, beverages, and essentials.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 53, 102, 0.08); transition: all 0.4s ease; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 53, 102, 0.05); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 53, 102, 0.15); } .ds-card-icon { width: 70px; height: 70px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #003566, #0056b3); border-radius: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: #ffffff; } .ds-card h3 { color: #003566; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-card p { color: #333333; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Stat Counter
components.description: Glassmorphism stat box on gradient background. 2024 SaaS template effect.
components.html:
100+
Smart Machines
components.css: .ds-stat-wrapper { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #003566 0%, #004578 100%); padding: 3rem 2rem; } .ds-stat-box { text-align: center; color: #ffffff; padding: 2rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); } .ds-stat-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; opacity: 0.9; } .ds-stat-number { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; margin: 1rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, #ffd60a); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: 0.9; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Chip/Badge
components.description: Small pill-shaped tag for metadata. Standard pattern.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #f8f9fa; padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #003566; font-weight: 500; display: inline-block; }

narrative.overview: The existing design uses a corporate blue-and-yellow palette (#003566 / #ffd60a) with Poppins headings and Inter body text. The visual system leans heavily on gradients, glassmorphism, and modern card-based layouts common to 2023-2025 SaaS marketing sites. TARGET: The design should feel tech-forward, data-driven, and operationally efficient - like a modern logistics dashboard meets premium service branding. Think smart city infrastructure, real-time monitoring systems, and precision operations, not generic B2B corporate.
keyCharacteristics: Premium service quality (not consumer-grade or industrial)

rules.name: The Gradient Overuse Problem
rules.body: The current system defaults to gradients everywhere - hero backgrounds, buttons, stats sections. This is the 2023-2025 SaaS template reflex. The next iteration should use gradients sparingly and intentionally, not as texture.

rules.name: The Color Strategy Gap
rules.body: The palette needs to move from 'restrained corporate' to 'committed tech-forward.' A single saturated brand color should carry 30-60% of key surfaces, replacing the navy-yellow split.

rules.name: The Default Font Problem
rules.body: Poppins + Inter is the 2023-2026 landing page standard. It's everywhere because it's safe, not because it's distinctive. 'Smart operator' positioning needs either: (a) a technical/monospace accent (data-driven precision), (b) a sharper geometric sans (operational efficiency), or (c) a condensed display with punch (command attention).

rules.name: The Shadow Everywhere Problem
rules.body: Every surface has a shadow, making depth feel uniform rather than intentional. A 'smart operator' system should use shadows structurally (modals, dropdowns, true elevation) not decoratively (every card by default).

rules.name: The Card Grid Problem
rules.body: The homepage is: hero → 4-card grid → stats section → 4-card grid → 4-step cards → 6-card grid → 3-card grid → FAQ accordion. Every section is a card grid. This is the landing page default structure, not a distinctive layout.

dos: Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text)
Do keep line-height at 1.6+ for body text
Do use semantic HTML and proper ARIA labels
Do provide reduced-motion alternatives for animations
donts: Don't use the navy-yellow pairing (#003566 / #ffd60a) going forward. It's the generic B2B default and doesn't convey 'smart operator' positioning.
Don't default to card grids for every section. The current homepage is 90% cards. Layout variety creates hierarchy.
Don't use backdrop-blur glassmorphism as default texture. It's saturated across 2024-2025 landing pages.
Don't use gradients everywhere. Current system has gradient backgrounds in hero, stats, how-it-works, and multiple button states.
Don't pair Poppins + Inter without strategic reason. It's the 2023-2026 landing page default.
Don't use border-left accent stripes on cards. Absolute ban.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 · 02 · 03) above every section as scaffolding.
Don't drift toward cream/sand/parchment body backgrounds (OKLCH L 0.88-0.95, chroma < 0.06, hue 50-80).
